basics.name: Amer Fathullah
basics.label: Full-Stack Software Engineer | DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building, deploying, and operating enterprise web, mobile, ERP, fintech, and AI-enabled systems. Strong hands-on experience across Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core/.NET, ASP.NET Boilerplate, ABP Zero, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, Linode, Datadog, Bitbucket Pipelines, Flutter, Firebase, Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. Comfortable owning the full software lifecycle across frontend, backend, database, DevOps, CI/CD, observability, production support, and cloud infrastructure. Uses AI-assisted engineering workflows with GitHub Copilot, custom copilot-instructions.md, MCP servers, and Google Antigravity for personal projects.

work.name: TFX Islamic Sdn Bhd
work.summary: Owns full-stack development, DevOps, CI/CD, database, cloud infrastructure, and production observability for enterprise ERP and supply chain financing platforms.
responsibilities: Built and maintained multi-tenant ERP and supply chain financing platforms using Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core/.NET, ASP.NET Boilerplate, ABP Zero, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, and Redis caching.

Delivered business modules across inventory, purchasing, sales, HR, payroll, finance, manufacturing, reporting, dashboards, warehouse, cashbooks, ESG, asset register, project management, tax reporting, import/export, quotations, tender box, approvals, delivery order, POS, and marketplace workflows.

Developed procurement and payable workflows including purchase requisition, purchase order, vendor invoices, goods received note, debit note, credit note, petty cash, employee claims, and approval routing.

Implemented accounting and finance capabilities including chart of accounts, journal entries, general ledger, profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow, financial reports, management reports, auditing, budgeting, bank reconciliation, and consolidated ledger across multi-tenant structures.

Built advanced financial consolidation and investment features including goodwill, minority interest, intra-group elimination, asset disposal, long-term investment, short-term investment, equity investment, and disposal of investment.

Developed inventory, warehouse, and manufacturing features including inventory transfer between locations, transfer from factory, write-off, stock count, project issue note, production report, sales quotation, purchasing quotation, and delivery order workflows.
Integrated Malaysian LHDN e-Invoice functionality and payment gateway workflows using Billplz and HitPay.
Designed, maintained, extended, and improved Bitbucket Pipelines CI/CD from scratch for Development, Staging, and Production environments.
Deployed applications to Kubernetes and administered Kubernetes clusters, including workload deployment, environment configuration, infrastructure troubleshooting, and operational support.
Supported cloud infrastructure on Linode after a migration from AWS, with ongoing preparation for future Alibaba Cloud migration planning.
Implemented Datadog monitoring for Kubernetes workloads in under one week, improving visibility into cluster health, application behavior, infrastructure metrics, and production issues.
Used GitHub Copilot, custom copilot-instructions.md, agentic AI workflows, and MCP server integration to improve coding productivity, consistency, and development workflow quality.
Worked across frontend, backend, database, DevOps, CI/CD, monitoring, and production support responsibilities in Agile/Scrum delivery environments.

work.name: CEFS Response
work.summary: Built internal mobile automation tools while supporting technical review, vendor coordination, and safety operations.
responsibilities: Developed cross-platform mobile applications for Android and iOS using Flutter, Dart, and Firebase.
Built automation apps that reduced manual operational processes by 20+ hours per month.
Supported technical reviews, documentation, stakeholder communication, and vendor coordination.
Contributed to workplace safety and emergency response readiness through industrial firefighting training.

work.name: Skymind
work.summary: Worked on AI, computer vision, dashboard, and enterprise monitoring solutions using frontend and machine learning technologies.
responsibilities: Developed frontend interfaces and dashboards for AI-based monitoring systems analyzing video feeds and operational data.
Built COVID-19 VPass dashboards used by enterprises to monitor employee health status and reduce reporting overhead.
Worked with Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, React, React Native, PostgreSQL, Java, and Node.js for AI, dashboard, and application development tasks.
Researched reinforcement learning algorithms for traffic light optimization, achieving up to 25% reduction in simulated congestion.
Mentored junior developers in the AI-GET program and supported technical knowledge sharing.

work.name: Sapura Thales Electronics Sdn Bhd
work.location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
work.summary: Supported internal system development, testing, and customer service engineering tasks.
responsibilities: Supported development of an inventory management system in PHP and MySQL, enabling tracking of product repair history across departments.
Assisted with system testing, debugging, and documentation to improve stability for daily operations.

volunteer.summary: Launched an independent freelance service brand and public landing page for web and mobile development services. No client delivery claimed yet.
highlights: Built the AF Tech service website using Astro, Tailwind CSS, and Sanity CMS concepts for a modern, responsive, SEO-friendly web presence.
Defined service offerings for landing pages, business websites, web applications, CMS integration, Flutter mobile apps, Android/iOS development, and maintenance work.
Uses AI-assisted design and development workflows to accelerate ideation, prototyping, and implementation.

education.institution: Centre for Foundation Studies, International Islamic University of Malaysia

certificates.name: Bachelor of Engineering (Electronics - Computer and Information) (Honours)
Artificial Intelligence from a Data Perspective
Flutter & Dart - The Complete Guide [2022 Edition]
Build an app with ASP.NET Core and Angular from scratch

projects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning Platform
projects.description: Enterprise multi-tenant ERP platform supporting core business operations across finance, procurement, inventory, HR, payroll, manufacturing, warehouse, tax, reporting, and project workflows.
highlights: Built with Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core/.NET, ASP.NET Boilerplate, ABP Zero, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, and Bitbucket Pipelines.

Implemented ERP modules including inventory, purchasing, sales, HR, payroll, finance, manufacturing, reporting, dashboards, warehouse, cashbooks, ESG, asset register, project management, tax reporting, import/export, and approvals.

Developed accounting features including chart of accounts, journal entries, general ledger, profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow, financial reports, management reports, auditing, budgeting, bank reconciliation, and multi-tenant consolidated ledger.

Implemented operational workflows including sales quotation, purchase quotation, tender box, delivery order, POS, marketplace, goods received note, debit note, credit note, purchase requisition, purchase order, vendor invoices, petty cash, and employee claims.

Implemented advanced inventory and production workflows including inventory transfer, transfer from factory, write-off, stock count, project issue note, production report, asset disposal, investments, and disposal of investment.
Integrated LHDN e-Invoice and payment gateway flows using Billplz and HitPay.
Supported Dev, Staging, and Production deployments with Docker, Kubernetes, Linode, Datadog, and custom Bitbucket Pipelines CI/CD.

projects.name: Supply Chain Financing Platform
projects.description: Fintech platform helping businesses improve liquidity and optimize working capital through supply chain financing workflows.
highlights: Built with Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core/.NET, ASP.NET Boilerplate, ABP Zero, Entity Framework Core, Microsoft SQL Server, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Developed secure REST API integrations and enterprise workflows connected with the ERP platform.
Supported authentication, authorization, multi-tenant data handling, financial workflows, and production deployment processes.

projects.name: MyERP
projects.description: Personal ERP project and latest active software engineering project focused on building a modern ERP platform using ABP Framework and full-stack enterprise patterns.
highlights: Built with ABP Framework (abp.io), .NET/C#, TypeScript, HTML, SCSS, JavaScript, and Docker Compose.
Uses personal-project experience with ABP Framework to complement professional ASP.NET Boilerplate and ABP Zero experience at TFX.
Explores modular ERP architecture, multi-tenancy concepts, backend APIs, frontend integration, and development automation.

projects.name: AF Tech Freelance Service Website
projects.description: Public freelance service website for web development, mobile app development, CMS integration, and maintenance offerings.
highlights: Built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and Sanity CMS concepts for a responsive, SEO-friendly service website.
Defines service offerings for landing pages, business websites, e-commerce solutions, web applications, CMS integration, Flutter mobile apps, Android/iOS apps, and ongoing maintenance.
Uses AI-assisted design and implementation workflows for rapid prototyping and service positioning.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Print-friendly portfolio and CV website configurable through JSON.
highlights: Built with Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and JSON-based content configuration.
Designed to showcase professional experience, skills, certificates, projects, and contact details in a fast, static portfolio.

projects.name: Neko Money Manager
projects.description: Personal finance and money management mobile application project.
highlights: Built primarily with Flutter/Dart with multi-platform project structure for Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, web, and Windows.
Demonstrates mobile UI development, local app architecture, cross-platform Flutter project setup, and personal finance domain experimentation.

projects.name: FBNeo 1G1R DAT Filter
projects.description: Python utility that filters FinalBurn Neo and Logiqx XML DAT files to produce a clean 1 Game 1 Region ROM set.
highlights: Built a Python script for ROM management automation, XML parsing, region prioritization, clone filtering, and clean dataset generation.
Demonstrates practical scripting, data filtering, automation, CLI-style tooling, and retro-gaming domain problem solving.

projects.name: Self-Hosted Homelab
projects.description: Personal self-hosting environment for media, photo management, and infrastructure learning.
highlights: Self-hosts Jellyfin and Immich using Linux and containerized infrastructure concepts.
Applies Docker, Docker Compose, Linux administration, service monitoring, reverse proxy concepts, and Grafana-style observability practices.
Uses homelab experience to strengthen practical DevOps, networking, storage, backup, and operations skills.
